narrative:
Troy Twp township has 1,755 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.1 percentage points.
